ABOUT

Who's behind HalkaX

@HalkaX
aka Halka Hack

I'm Halka Hack, online as HalkaX — an AI developer and prompt engineer who builds custom automation agents, generates AI video content, and animates in 2D. I also handle everyday tech troubleshooting: installing operating systems and fixing laptop, PC, and mobile issues. On the security side, I offer client-authorized ethical hacking services — load testing, SQL injection checks, and Wi-Fi security audits. Alongside the technical work, I run ASMR miniature content across Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook for a growing audience.

CAPABILITIES

Skill modules

MOD // 01

AI Agent Development

Designing and building custom automation agents that connect messaging platforms with everyday desktop tasks.

MOD // 02

Prompt Engineering

Crafting and refining prompts to get consistent, reliable output from AI models.

MOD // 03

2D Animation

Certified in 2D animation fundamentals — timing, motion, and frame-by-frame craft.

MOD // 04

AI Video Generation

Producing generative-AI video content from concept to finished clip.

MOD // 05

OS Installation & Tech Support

Installing operating systems and resolving laptop, PC, and mobile issues quickly.

MOD // 06

Content Creation

Producing ASMR miniature videos for audiences across Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook.

MOD // 07

Ethical Hacking & Security Testing

Client-authorized security testing: load/stress testing to check how a site holds up under traffic, SQL injection checks to test user-data safety, and Wi-Fi network security audits. Available for hire — always with the client's permission.

FEATURED BUILD

HalkaX Assistant

A personal automation agent, controlled from your pocket

HalkaX Assistant is a desktop automation agent I built to control everyday tasks remotely through Telegram — sending messages, running routine automations, and managing files on my own machine from anywhere.
